---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    geometry:
      - top=20mm
      - bottom=25mm
      - left=22mm
      - right=22mm
    fontsize: 11pt
    colorlinks: false
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    output-file: cv
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhead[L]{Rodrigo Aguayo}
          \fancyhead[R]{Curriculum Vitae}
          \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
          \usepackage{enumitem}
          \setlist{nosep,leftmargin=2em}
          \setlength{\parskip}{0.5em}
          \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
---

<div class="page">

# Curriculum Vitae

<a href="cv.pdf" class="download-btn">⬇ Download PDF</a>

```{=html}
<div style="height: 1rem;"></div>
```

---

## Positions

- **2025–present**: Postdoctoral Fellow (FWO), Vrije Universiteit Brussel — ICE-BUFFER project
- **2024–2025**: Postdoctoral Researcher, Vrije Universiteit Brussel — ICE³ project

## Education

- **2019–2023**: PhD in Environmental Sciences, Universidad de Concepción, Chile
- **2017–2019**: MSc in Civil Engineering (Water Resources), Universidad de Concepción, Chile
- **2012–2018**: Civil Engineering (Hydraulic-Environmental), Universidad de Concepción, Chile
- **2022**: Research stay on regional glacier modelling, University of Innsbruck, Austria

## Grants & Funding

- **2025–2028**: FWO Postdoctoral Junior Fellowship — ICE-BUFFER project
- **2019–2023**: ANID National Doctoral Fellowship (Chile)
- **2022**: ANID International Research Stay Fellowship
- **2021–2022**: ANID Operational Expenses Grant
- **2023**: ANID Doctoral Writing Extension Fellowship

## Awards

- **2025**: Outstanding Reviewer Award, *The Cryosphere* (EGU)
- **2017**: Professor Edgar Pino Barrueto Prize — Best Civil Engineering thesis

## Supervision

- **Magali Ponds** (PhD, VUB, 2024–2027) — Irrigation effects on glacier evolution in High-Mountain Asia
- **Maziar Freki** (MSc, VUB, 2024–2025) — Closing regional water budget in Western Patagonia using SWOT data
- **Garance du Bus de Warnaffe** (MSc, VUB, 2024–2025) — Time of emergence of glacier runoff in Patagonia
- **Francesco Calista** (MSc, VUB, 2025–2026) — Glacier melt implications for water security in High-Mountain Asia
- **Fernanda Espinoza** (MSc, UCH, 2025–2026) — Flood forecasting using deep learning (co-supervision)
- **Isadora Leon** (MSc, UACH, 2023–2024) — Land cover effects on hydrological drought propagation (co-supervision)
- **Paul Sandoval** (BSc, UBB, 2021) — Global warming impacts in the upper Manso River basin

## Teaching

- **Surface Water Hydrology** (KU Leuven / VUB, 2025–2026)
- **GIS Applied to Environmental Science** (UDEC, 2023)
- **Fluid Mechanics** (UDEC, 2022)
- **Advanced Hydrology** (UDEC, 2020)
- **Distributed Hydrology** (UDEC, 2020)
- **Hydrology** (UDEC, 2016–2018)
- **Introduction to Environmental Science** (UDEC, 2015)

## Selected Publications

Full list on the [Publications page](publications.qmd).

18+ peer-reviewed publications in journals including *Nature Climate Change*, *The Cryosphere*, *Earth's Future*, *Scientific Data*, *Scientific Reports*, *Earth System Science Data*, *Journal of Glaciology*, *Climatic Change*, and others.

## Invited Talks

- Glacier modelling seminars (various institutions)
- EGU General Assembly sessions
- Latin American Hydraulics Congress
- Chilean Congress of Hydraulic Engineering

## Service

- Reviewer for *The Cryosphere*, *Journal of Glaciology*, *Hydrology and Earth System Sciences*
- Project scientist on 5+ applied research projects (academy and industry)
- Convenor at international conferences

## Skills

- **Programming**: Python, R, Julia, shell scripting
- **Glacier modelling**: OGGM, PyGEM, PISM
- **Hydrological modelling**: HBV, TETIS, WRF-Hydro
- **Deep learning**: PyTorch, TensorFlow, neural hydrology
- **Geospatial**: GIS, remote sensing, Google Earth Engine
- **Tools**: Quarto, Git, LaTeX, Docker, High-performance computing
- **Languages**: Spanish (native), English (fluent)

## Fieldwork

- Puelo River basin (Chile) — 2018–2021, trimestral hydrological campaigns
- Aysén region (Chile) — 2017, stream surveys in temperate forests
- Bordu and Kara-Batkak glaciers (Kyrgyzstan) — 2024, glacier monitoring with drones

</div>
